cost_components_summary: No separate non-commodity residual cost is calibrated. Carbon costs are priced by normal solver semantics.
input_basis_notes: No commodity input is attached to this non-energy residual; direct emissions are carried in the process emissions field.
emissions_boundary_notes: Represents explicit soil fertiliser and residue emissions split from product-output or aggregate residual rows.
rollout_limit_notes: Single residual incumbent route; scenario control is by enabling or disabling the role method.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as a coarse calibration placeholder until explicit modules are authored.
evidence_summary: Derived from the migrated agriculture and land-sector calibration layer and official Australian inventory closure totals.
derivation_method: Mechanical split from product-output or aggregate residual rows into an explicit residual role with demand anchor 1.0.
review_notes: Residual stub for closure and scenario accounting, not an optimisable biological or land-system model.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Replace with explicit livestock methane manure soil fertiliser residue and land-stock modules when source data support them.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Can map to a fixed calibration demand process with direct non-energy emissions.
